title: Chronicled Umbrellas
description: Just about the simplest Umbrella mod around.
body:
# Chronicled Umbrellas

Chronicled Umbrellas is a small mod that adds 9 umbrellas in various colors to the game to make your exploration a little safer.

![All Umbrella Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ddec0de48ef8609eff4475ad22601d5339dbb86.png)
# Functions

The umbrellas slow your fall as you hold them, negating all fall damage. All 9 umbrella types are craftable in survival (see the gallery for a demonstration of how they work and the recipes)

![Player Holding An Umbrella](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dfb9a756668745461db19d122d88812a4aacf96.png)
